The main workflow runs locally in your browser, is free, and requires no account.

One calm, offline-friendly app for the whole family—no ads, chat or social feeds.

posts.tagline: Smart Conveyor Systems for Faster, Safer

posts.name: PayCalcHub
posts.tagline: Take-home pay calculators for all 50 US states. Always free.
posts.description: PayCalcHub offers free, transparent financial calculators for US workers: salary (take-home pay for all 50 states plus DC, Canada, UK, and Australia), mortgage (full PITI with amortization), loan, and hourly-to-salary conversion. Every calculator uses current IRS brackets, state tax rates, and FICA data, updated annually, with methodology and sources documented on every page. No signup, no paywall, no ads disguised as advice. Built and maintained by one person.

Designed for kids, families, teachers, and anyone who enjoys simple drawing, it includes a wide range of brushes, stamps, shapes, text tools, and fun magic effects. posts.tagline: A free Flutter mobile app for tracking books
posts.description: ReadStats is a free, local-first reading tracker — no account, no ads, no subscriptions. Your library and stats never leave your device. What's different: a built-in stopwatch makes reading sessions the core unit, not just finished books. You get deep stats (speed, streaks, calendar history), achievements, and shareable stat cards — all free, where other trackers paywall them. Built solo over 3 years because Goodreads is an ad farm and my data is mine.

posts.name: A self-hosted RAG chatbot boilerplate
posts.tagline: Own your RAG and LLM stack. GDPR compliance built-in.
posts.description: EuroRAG is source code for building AI chatbots over your documents. Upload PDF, DOCX, or spreadsheets. Ask questions. Get answers with source citations. GDPR compliance is architectural. Deletion cascades across database, vector store, search index, and disk. Per-provider data residency tracking. Strict EU Mode blocks non-compliant providers before any data leaves your server. Audit logging of every operation. Consent management with withdrawal support. Data export for subject access requests.

posts.name: LinkAffix
posts.tagline: Turn AI recommendations into affiliate revenue
posts.description: LinkAffix turns the product recommendations your AI already makes into affiliate revenue with one server-side API call, no cookies and no client-side code. Most affiliate tracking depends on browser JavaScript and third-party cookies that don't exist when your ‘page’ is a streaming LLM response. LinkAffix solves this with first-party, server-side attribution: send us your LLM's response text, get back the same text with tracked affiliate links woven into the real product mentions already in it.

posts.description: Three classic brain games, together in one app: Sudoku, 2048, and Grid Gloom, a light up logic puzzle. What ties them together is one progression system. Every game you finish feeds the same daily streak, weekly challenges, achievements and Game Center leaderboards, so three separate games become one daily habit. Sudoku has five difficulties, smart notes, mistake tracking and undo. Free to play, with a one time unlock to remove ads and optional hint packs. iPhone and iPad.

posts.name: Snapbum – Event Communities

posts.description: Snapbum is the social layer for events. Most event platforms help people discover an event. Once the event ends, the community disappears. Snapbum helps organizers build communities and enables attendees to stay connected before, during and after every experience. Create events, join communities, meet attendees and discover what's next. Events bring people together. Communities keep them together.

Use objects, plan each route, and learn the rules behind every threat. The game starts instantly in your browser with no download or account required.
